> **Comms Analyst Agent Request**
> Use this direct-link template if you need a URL that opens the request fields immediately.
> If you prefer the guided GitHub form UI, open `/issues/new/choose` and select **Submit a new request to Comms Analyst Agent**.

### Monitoring prompt

<!-- Describe what the agent should monitor.
Example: Track sentiment around GitHub Copilot over the last 72 hours, competitors: OpenAI, GitLab -->

### Urgency

- [ ] Standard
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

### Slack recipient (User ID or Channel ID)

Use a Slack user ID (starts with U) for a direct message, or a channel ID (starts with C) for channel delivery. -->
